news.headline: Putin Said the War ‘Is Coming to a Close,’ but That’s Not All He Said
news.summary: The Russian leader is walking a tightrope: acknowledging public discontent while offering no indication that he might give up on his demands.

news.headline: South African president says he will not step down after impeachment call
news.summary: President Cyril Ramaphosa said he would not resign on Monday evening after days of speculation.
